title: Tanis (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tanis''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Darth Tanis]]''', a [[Sith Lord]].
*'''[[Tanis]]''', a location within [[the galaxy]].
*'''[[Tanis (Chandrila)|Tanis]]''', the [[Chandrilan]] mother of [[Mon Mothma]].
*'''[[Tanis Legion]]''', a [[Sith trooper]] [[legion]] within the [[Sith Eternal]], named after Darth Tanis.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Tanis (Jedi)|Tanis]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].
*'''[[Tanis Hal]]''', a secretary to [[Hamnet]].
*'''[[Tanis Mothma]]''', the [[Chandrilan/Legends|Chandrilan]] mother of [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].
*'''[[Tanis Venn]]''', a former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
*'''[[Darra Thel-Tanis]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].

==See also==
*[[Tanith (disambiguation)]]

{{Disambig}}
